expectations.text: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
expectations.evidence: Separate sections for 'Dev Clusters' and 'Prod Clusters' in both pre and post checklists, plus environment-specific items.

expectations.text: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
expectations.evidence: States 'Google manages node upgrades automatically. Your focus shifts to control plane timing, workload compatibility, and validation.' Includes resource requests section.

expectations.text: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
expectations.evidence: Provides 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' and mentions checking GKE release notes.

expectations.text: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
expectations.evidence: Dedicated 'Resource Requests (Autopilot-Specific)' section with command to find pods missing requests.

expectations.text: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
expectations.evidence: Sections for PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown with specific kubectl commands for each.

expectations.text: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
expectations.evidence: Includes gcloud command to verify control plane version and node pool versions.

expectations.text: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
expectations.evidence: Checks for deployments at desired replicas, StatefulSets ready, CrashLoopBackOff pods, and service endpoints.

expectations.text: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
expectations.evidence: Section 'Quick Reference: Dev to Prod Rollout Sequence' with Week 1-4 timeline starting with dev clusters first.
Observability section covering metrics pipeline, error rates, latency baselines, and logging pipeline validation.
